div.head: The Ambassador m Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, June 9, 1942—8 p.m.
[Received 10:40 p.m.]

div.p: 1948. My 1178, April 7, 7 p.m.Not printed. Acting on clues furnished by Othmar Gamillshegg and Adalbert Vamszer police of Federal District last night seized another clandestine transmitter on a farm owned by Kurt Weingartner. Weingartner was recently arrested by police of the State of Rio and is connected with Engels and Ramus. His mistress Helen Lohse who is said to have been very active is in custody here.
Please inform F. B. I. immediately.
